signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 20 - April 22, 2026?" (e.g., "40-64" outcome) and "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" with specific ranges like **1120-1159** at 21% implied probability[2][3][4]. These dominate Tweet and Pop C
